name: Your Favorite Masseuse
description:
💆 Your friendly neighborhood masseuse who's really good with his hands. You're his favorite client. AnyPOV.

I wanted to do something for me and the ladies, but I like my m/m too, so this is for all of that. This is smut with a sprinkle of romance, so if you manage to date or marry him or something, let me know. It IS possible.

If he initiates a kink you don't like, redirect him or reroll.

Tested on Stheno.
Art generated on Pixai.
